Class JsonParser

java.lang.Object
server.filemanagar.JsonParser
public class JsonParser extends Object
Provides high-level JSON operations for reading and writing MusicBand collections. Acts as a facade, delegating calls to specific JSON handlers (JsonWriter, JsonReader, JsonCleaner, JsonDateReader). Implements the Singleton pattern to ensure a single point of access.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    cleanFile()
    Cleans (truncates) the JSON file by delegating to JsonCleaner.cleanFile().
    String
    getCreationTimeOfFile()
    Retrieves the creation time of the JSON file.
    static JsonParser
    getInstance()
    Returns the singleton instance of JsonParser.
    static void
    initialize()
    Initializes the singleton instance of JsonParser.
    Hashtable<Integer, MusicBand>
    readAllClassesAtFile()
    Reads all MusicBand objects from the JSON file and returns them as a Hashtable.
    void
    writeLibraryToFile(Hashtable<Integer, MusicBand> Map)
    Writes the entire collection (Hashtable) of MusicBand objects to the JSON file.
    void
    writeOneClassToFile(int key, MusicBand musicBand)
    Writes a single MusicBand object associated with a specific key to the JSON file.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public static void initialize()
      Initializes the singleton instance of JsonParser. Must be called once before using the instance.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the instance has already been initialized

    • getInstance

      public static JsonParser getInstance()
      Returns the singleton instance of JsonParser.
      Returns:
      the singleton instance
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the instance has not been initialized

    • writeOneClassToFile

      public void writeOneClassToFile(int key, MusicBand musicBand)
      Writes a single MusicBand object associated with a specific key to the JSON file. Delegates to JsonWriter.writeValue(int, MusicBand).
      Parameters:
      key - the key associated with the MusicBand
      musicBand - the MusicBand object to write

    • writeLibraryToFile

      public void writeLibraryToFile(Hashtable<Integer, MusicBand> Map)
      Writes the entire collection (Hashtable) of MusicBand objects to the JSON file. Delegates to JsonWriter.writeMap(Hashtable).
      Parameters:
      Map - the Hashtable containing the collection (keyed by Integer)

    • readAllClassesAtFile

      public Hashtable<Integer, MusicBand> readAllClassesAtFile()
      Reads all MusicBand objects from the JSON file and returns them as a Hashtable. Delegates to JsonReader.readFile().
      Returns:
      a Hashtable containing the deserialized MusicBand objects

    • cleanFile

      public void cleanFile()
      Cleans (truncates) the JSON file by delegating to JsonCleaner.cleanFile().

    • getCreationTimeOfFile

      public String getCreationTimeOfFile()
      Retrieves the creation time of the JSON file. Delegates to JsonDateReader.getCreationTime().
      Returns:
      a string containing the creation time (possibly colored)
